data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario where a primary card is declined and a backup is charged. However, the evidence does not provide any details or outcomes related to the payment method testing, specifically the handling of declined payments and subsequent charges. The lack of evidence regarding the actual behavior of the payment methods constitutes a gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of payment method behavior when primary card is declined.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
